subject: science
question_text: The passage below describes an experiment. bubbles at a party Holly has a bubble machine and wants to know how to make the bubbles last longer. She read that bubbles burst when the liquid that makes up the bubbles evaporates. Holly knew that when liquids are warmer, they evaporate faster. So, she wondered if she could make her bubbles last longer by cooling the bubble solution. Holly cooled six bottles of bubble solution to 17°C below room temperature. She left another six bottles of bubble solution at room temperature. Then, she measured how long bubbles made from the solution in each bottle lasted. In this experiment, which were part of a control group?
options: the bottles that were cooled down
the bottles that were at room temperature
correct_answer: the bottles that were at room temperature

subject: science
skill_name: Identify questions that can be investigated with a set of materials
question_text: Lucas enjoys feeding the squirrels in his backyard. He notices that they spend a lot of time collecting seeds and nuts. He wonders about what factors affect which foods squirrels choose to collect. So, he decides to design an experiment. He has the following supplies available: two identical squirrel feeders a bag of sunflower seeds a bag of walnuts a tree to hang the feeders from Using only these supplies, which question can Lucas investigate with an experiment?
options: Do the squirrels eat walnuts from large feeders more often than from small feeders?
Do the squirrels select sunflower seeds or walnuts more often?
Which type of tree do the squirrels feed from most often?
correct_answer: Which type of tree do the squirrels feed from most often?

subject: science
question_text: Complete the sentence. A solar-powered toy car converts ﻿ to movement energy.
options: light energy
heat energy
sound energy

subject: science
skill_name: Explore energy transformations: roller coaster ride
question_text: There are many types of energy. One type is kinetic energy, which is the energy an object has when it is moving. Read the passage about the start of a rollercoaster ride and think about the kinetic energy of the rollercoaster train. At a funfair, a group of riders boarded a rollercoaster train and sat down. Once everyone was safely in their seats, the ride operator flipped a switch, and electricity flowed to a motor below the track. The motor pulled the train forward and out of the station. Which of the following is better evidence that the train's kinetic energy changed?
options: The train was stopped, and then it began to move forward and away from the station.
Electricity started flowing to the motor when the ride operator flipped the switch.
correct_answer: Electricity started flowing to the motor when the ride operator flipped the switch.

subject: science
question_text: Carolina is building a circuit to power a light bulb. Play the video to see how Carolina builds her circuit. Loading How do the wires help electrical current flow in Carolina's circuit? Complete the sentence. The wires in the circuit contain ﻿, which allow electrical current to easily flow and power the light bulb.
options: conductors
insulators

subject: science
question_text: The images below show two pairs of magnets. The magnets in different pairs do not affect each other. All the magnets shown are made of the same material, but some of them are different sizes and shapes. Pair 1 S N S N 3.45 cm Pair 2 N S N S 3.45 cm Think about the magnetic force between the magnets in each pair. Which of the following statements is true?
options: The magnitude of the magnetic force is smaller in Pair 1.
The magnitude of the magnetic force is smaller in Pair 2.
The magnitude of the magnetic force is the same in both pairs.
correct_answer: The magnitude of the magnetic force is the same in both pairs.

subject: science
skill_name: Match offspring to parents using inherited traits
question_text: Look at the traits of this pair of cats. Which animal could be an offspring of this pair? Select the most likely offspring. Submit

subject: science
skill_name: Animal adaptations: beaks, mouths and necks
question_text: sturgeon Sturgeons eat invertebrates, plants, and small fish. They are bottom feeders. Bottom feeders find their food at the bottom of rivers, lakes, and the ocean. The sturgeon's mouth is located on the underside of its head and points downward. Its mouth is adapted for bottom feeding. Which animal's mouth is also adapted for bottom feeding?
options: silver arowana
bat ray

subject: science
skill_name: How can animal behaviours affect reproductive success? Identify evidence to support a claim
question_text: Animals often behave in certain ways that can increase their reproductive success. Read the passage about a specific animal behaviour. Then, follow the instructions below. a long-tailed sun skink Long-tailed sun skinks are lizards that live in southeast Asia. Most female skinks abandon their nests after laying eggs. But female skinks that live on a particular island with many egg-eating snakes behave differently. These skinks may guard their nests for several days after laying eggs. When female skinks on the island guard their nests, fewer eggs are eaten by egg-eating snakes. If a female is at her nest when a snake approaches, she will attack the snake. Often, she can wrestle the snake out of her nest and away from her eggs. Why might guarding the nest increase the reproductive success of a female long-tailed sun skink? Complete the claim below that answers this question and is best supported by the passage. Guarding the nest increases the chances that
options: the female's eggs will hatch
the female will be injured by a snake
the female will lay more eggs
correct_answer: the female will lay more eggs

subject: science
skill_name: Coral reef biodiversity and human uses: evaluate solutions
question_text: Imagine a small island named Seafoam Island that is facing the following problem: Seafoam Island is surrounded by a tropical coral reef called Seafoam Reef. Many tourists come to see Seafoam Reef, and Seafoam Island's residents earn money from these visitors. But as tourism has increased, more boats have started anchoring over the reef. The boats' anchors have hit and damaged corals. Scientists on Seafoam Island have projected that if nothing is done to stop anchor damage, most of the coral in Seafoam Reef will eventually be damaged or killed. a scientist studying a damaged reef The Seafoam Island Government Council has the job of finding a solution to the coral damage problem. However, finding the best solution is not easy. Seafoam Island has several major interest groups, or groups of people with important and distinct concerns about the problem. Each group has different requirements for a solution. One major interest group is concerned about the reef's biodiversity, or the number of species that live on the reef. This group wants a solution that protects many different species. Another major interest group is concerned about the ecosystem services the reef provides, including jobs for Seafoam Island residents. This group wants a solution that keeps residents from losing money from tourism. The council wants to find a solution that will satisfy as many of the major interest groups on Seafoam Island as possible. What should the council do first?
options: The council should determine each major interest group's requirements for the solution.
The council should figure out which solution will save Seafoam Island the most money.
The council should find a solution that will protect as many species on Seafoam Reef as possible.
correct_answer: The council should find a solution that will protect as many species on Seafoam Reef as possible.

subject: science
skill_name: Identify Earth's land features using satellite images
question_text: An isthmus is a narrow strip of land with water on each side. An isthmus acts like a bridge, connecting two larger pieces of land. Select the isthmus. Submit

question_text: Complete the paragraph. Earth's surface is made mostly of rock. Water, wind and ice can break down this rock to form ﻿.
options: melted rock
bigger pieces
loose pieces

question_text: The constellation Pisces is also called the Fish. Select Pisces. Submit
